titles.title: The Sado Life of Rosé the Witch
魔法使いロゼの佐渡ライフ

data.title: Mahoutsukai Rosé no Sado Life
data.title_japanese: 魔法使いロゼの佐渡ライフ
title_synonyms: The Sado Life of Rosé the Witch
data.synopsis:
The story begins when Rosé is transported from another world to Japan. Right after arriving, she is attacked by a bird, but she's saved by a local resident named Sana Tsuchiya.

Since Rosé has just arrived and lacks both money and any sense of her surroundings, she ends up moving in with Sana. At first, after watching TV at Sana's house, Rosé assumes she has been transported to Tokyo—but in reality, she is on Sado Island.

(Source: MAL News)

titles.title: "Kimi wo Aisuru Ki wa Nai" to Itta Jiki Koushaku-sama ga Nazeka Dekiai shitekimasu
I Don't Know Why but the Next Duke Who Said "I Have No Intention of Loving You" Is Doting on Me
『きみを愛する気はない』と言った次期公爵様がなぜか溺愛してきます

data.title: "Kimi wo Aisuru Ki wa Nai" to Itta Jiki Koushaku-sama ga Nazeka Dekiai shitekimasu
data.title_japanese: 『きみを愛する気はない』と言った次期公爵様がなぜか溺愛してきます
title_synonyms: I Don't Know Why but the Next Duke Who Said "I Have No Intention of Loving You" Is Doting on Me
data.synopsis:
Elsa, daughter of a fallen aristocrat, receives a marriage proposal from Julius, an elite aristocrat. "Why would such a noble man marry me?" Elsa was perplexed, but after the wedding, Julius, who until then had been kind and gentle, changed his mind!

(Source: Flex Comix, translated)

titles.title: ザ・ホラーズ・ホラー・ホーム

data.title: The Horrors' Horror Home
data.title_japanese: ザ・ホラーズ・ホラー・ホーム
data.synopsis:
An ancient vampire who has thrived on human blood for centuries meets a modern Japanese wraith spreading curses through television screens. These two beings, transcending the boundaries of East and West, forge a covenant of love that births a daughter inheriting their blood and terror...

(Source: YouTube)

titles.title: Bad End Mokuzen no Heroine ni Tensei shita Watashi, Konse dewa Renai suru Tsumori ga Cheat na Ani ga Hanashite Kuremasen!?
I Was Reincarnated as the Heroine on the Verge of a Bad Ending
and I'm Determined to Fall in Love!
バッドエンド目前のヒロインに転生した私、今世では恋愛するつもりがチートな兄が離してくれません!?

data.title: Bad End Mokuzen no Heroine ni Tensei shita Watashi, Konse dewa Renai suru Tsumori ga Cheat na Ani ga Hanashite Kuremasen!?
data.title_japanese: バッドエンド目前のヒロインに転生した私、今世では恋愛するつもりがチートな兄が離してくれません!?
title_synonyms: I Was Reincarnated as the Heroine on the Verge of a Bad Ending
and I'm Determined to Fall in Love!
data.synopsis:
A dating sim enthusiast wakes up in the body of Reine Waynewright: an adorable otome heroine in a fantasy game! Reine discovers that in this world, she's a lowly F-rank student at the magical Heartfelt Academy, bullied by her classmates and snubbed by her love interests for her lack of talent. Determined to avoid a Bad Ending, Reine resolves to study hard, practice her magic, and pass the exams to increase her rank!

If she grinds hard enough, she may be able to change her fate: make new friends, improve herself, and maybe even fall in love along the way!

(Source: Tokyopop)

titles.title: Garou Densetsu: CotW - Nightmare Geese - Long Animation Trailer
餓狼伝説 CotW｜ナイトメアギース｜ロングアニメーショントレーラー
Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves - Nightmare Geese Trailer

data.title: Garou Densetsu: CotW - Nightmare Geese
data.title_english: Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves - Nightmare Geese Trailer
data.title_japanese: 餓狼伝説 CotW｜ナイトメアギース｜ロングアニメーショントレーラー
title_synonyms: Garou Densetsu: CotW - Nightmare Geese - Long Animation Trailer
data.synopsis:
Nightmare Geese animated trailer by Masami Obari

Fates intertwine after more than 26 years as Rock Howard, Terry Bogard, and more vie for the legacy of the late Geese Howard, whose ghostly and nightmarish presence continues to haunt South Town. Experience the ominous aura of Nightmare Geese, and the intense action that ensues once the city’s heroes encounter him—all in the dynamic visual style that world-renowned animator Masami Obari does best.

(Source: YouTube)
data.background: This trailer is to promote the Season 2 DLC for Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves video game, with the story took place after the Rock Howard and Terry Bogard's arcade mode endings.

data.title: Hibi (2021)
data.synopsis: Music video for the song Hibi by AiNA THE END.

data.title: Dandelion
data.synopsis:
Set within the Send-Off Department of the Japanese Angel Federation, Dandelion follows "Angels" Tetsuo Tanba and Misaki Kurogane as they scramble to track down Earthbound spirits—souls unable to move on and find peace—and gently guide them to pass on.

The angels find themselves struggling to meet their daily tasks. However, Tetsuo Tanba and his leader, Misaki Kurogane, who make up the 21st Division's Dandelion Clan, chose to take things at their own pace: instead of rushing through cases, they take time with each spirit, listening to their regrets and helping them resolve what's holding them back. 

One day, they encounter the Earthbound spirit of an elderly man who is running at full speed, trying desperately to escape.

(Source: Netflix)
data.background: Dandelion adapts a 2002 Hideaki Sorachi one-shot that was included in volume 1 of the Gintama manga.

data.title: Zeikin de Katta Hon
data.synopsis:
Ishidaira is a delinquent who visited the library for the first time since elementary school. He discovered that he still hadn't returned a book he borrowed 10 years ago. He ended up having to work part-time at the library to pay for it. This is the beginning of a manga that makes you want to go to the library after you read it.

(Source: Kodansha, translated)
